chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 336 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 1445/2019 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Sardar Zafar Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Aamir Raza, advocate for respondent Per learned counsel, finalization of assessment is pending because of this petition. Per learned counsel the department be directed to finalize the assessment in accordance with law after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
